author: Initsnow
description: Detect and play harmonic progressions in configured folders. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Initsnow
manifest.description: Detect and play harmonic progressions in configured folders.
manifest.name: Harmony Progression Player

name: Harmony Progression Player

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Harmony Progression Player 0.1.5

- Detects harmony progressions in Obsidian notes and plays them inline.
- Supports numeric degrees, Roman numerals, chord symbols, extensions, altered chords, and slash chords.
- Includes bundled sampled piano playback plus soft and bright synth options.
releases.name: Harmony Progression Player 0.1.5
